_template_note: Canvas mode reference config. Copy this file to setting/canvas_config.json before use.
Do not put API keys or Canvas tokens here. Put private values in setting/api_env.sh.
Use ./run_canvas.sh fetch, ./run_canvas.sh grade, ./run_canvas.sh preview, then ./run_canvas.sh upload.

_required_fields.roster: Optional local roster path. Recommended when Canvas lacks student IDs.
_required_fields.output_dir: Where generated outputs and caches go.

_lenient_canvas_policy.summary: Canvas mode uses grading_mode=lenient plus TA extra scoring rules.
_lenient_canvas_policy.regular_questions: Wrong answers within 3 questions: no deduction; within 6: about -1 total; more than 6: about -1.5 total; very unreasonable work: about -2 total; try not to go below 80% unless very poor.
